name: Residential Lease Agreement
description: A standard rental agreement between a landlord and tenant for a residential property.

sections.title: 1. Parties
sections.content: This Residential Lease Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between {{landlord_name}}, located at {{landlord_address}} (the "Landlord"), and {{tenant_name}} (the "Tenant").

sections.title: 2. Property
sections.content: The Landlord agrees to lease to the Tenant the residential property located at {{property_address}} (the "Property") for the period beginning {{lease_start_date}} and ending {{lease_end_date}}.

sections.title: 3. Rent
sections.content: The Tenant agrees to pay a monthly rent of {{monthly_rent}}, due on the {{rent_due_day}}st/th day of each month. Rent shall be paid by bank transfer, cheque, or such other method as agreed by the Landlord. A late payment fee of {{late_fee}} shall apply to payments received more than 5 days after the due date.

sections.title: 4. Security Deposit
sections.content: The Tenant shall pay a security deposit of {{security_deposit}} prior to taking occupancy. The deposit shall be held by the Landlord as security against damage to the Property beyond normal wear and tear, unpaid rent, or other breaches of this Agreement. The deposit shall be returned within 30 days of the end of the tenancy, less any legitimate deductions.

sections.title: 5. Utilities
sections.content: The following utilities are included in the rent: {{utilities}}. The Tenant is responsible for all other utilities and services not specified herein.

sections.title: 6. Use of Property
sections.content: The Property shall be used solely as a private residential dwelling for the Tenant and approved occupants. The Tenant shall not sublease the Property or any part thereof without the prior written consent of the Landlord.

sections.title: 7. Pets
sections.content: Pets are permitted as follows: {{pets_allowed}}. Any breach of this clause may result in termination of the tenancy.

sections.title: 8. Maintenance and Repairs
sections.content: The Tenant agrees to: (a) maintain the Property in a clean and sanitary condition; (b) promptly report any damage or required repairs to the Landlord; (c) be responsible for minor maintenance and repairs not exceeding an agreed threshold. The Landlord shall be responsible for structural repairs and maintaining the Property in a habitable condition.

sections.title: 9. Alterations
sections.content: The Tenant shall not make any alterations, additions, or improvements to the Property without the prior written consent of the Landlord. Any approved alterations shall, unless otherwise agreed, become part of the Property at the end of the tenancy.

sections.title: 10. Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate this Agreement at the end of the lease term by providing {{notice_period_days}} days' written notice. Early termination by the Tenant without cause may result in forfeiture of the security deposit and liability for rent until a replacement tenant is found.

sections.title: 11. Right of Entry
sections.content: The Landlord shall have the right to enter the Property with at least 24 hours' written notice for the purpose of inspection, repairs, or showing the Property to prospective tenants. In case of emergency, no prior notice is required.

sections.title: 12. Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law}}.

sections.title: Signatures
sections.content:
Both parties agree to the terms and conditions set out in this Residential Lease Agreement.

{{landlord_name}} (Landlord)
Signature: _______________________
Date: ____________________________

{{tenant_name}} (Tenant)
Signature: _______________________
Date: ____________________________
